news.title: Uniswap's fee switch vote starts today with announcements from other protocols coming in
news.summary:
Uni holders are voting on activating the fee switch on robinhood chain starting today and the first test of whether uni holders get any protocol revenue instead of only governance.

Also worth watching: morpho midnight (their fixed rate lending app) ships in the next few days, derive is rolling out v3 as their biggest upgrade yet, and pendle is doing a roadmap call on july 22.
